description_long: This nightclub features a rectangular, low-rise structure with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior is primarily composed of dark wood or wood-like panels on the upper section, contrasted by a lower facade with geometric, textured concrete or stone elements. The front side displays a bold, colorful mural or decorative panel, adding a vibrant accent to the otherwise subdued palette. Large, blocky forms and clean lines dominate the architecture, with no visible windows, suggesting a focus on privacy and exclusivity. The building sits on a broad, flat base, possibly representing a sidewalk or entry plaza. The overall appearance is contemporary, with hints of industrial and urban influences.
description: A modern, low-rise nightclub with dark wood panels, geometric concrete textures, and a colorful mural accent on the front facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the colorful mural panel and the main entrance area, with contrasting wood and concrete textures.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof and the solid, blocky structure with minimal decorative features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uniform wood paneling and textured concrete base, with no visible entrances or accents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the geometric concrete pattern and the uninterrupted wood surface on top.
attribute_signage: A colorful mural or decorative panel is present on the front facade, featuring abstract geometric patterns in blue and white. No text or illuminated signage is visible.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is located at the front, marked by a recessed area beneath the colorful mural panel. The entrance appears to be a wide, rectangular opening, possibly with glass or metal doors, and is framed by textured concrete elements. No awnings, steps, or ramps are visible.
